title: Phase 2: Migrate hardcoded SEO strings to getBrand()
body: Replace hardcoded brand strings in src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx metadata, mergeOpenGraph, and other files with getBrand() calls. See issue #1575 Phase 2.
rationale: Phase 1 created the abstraction; Phase 2 begins consuming it by migrating ~15 files of hardcoded A-Guy strings.

title: Phase 3: Move favicon/manifest into brand bundle
body: Move favicon.svg and manifest.json assets into src/brands/aguy/assets/. See issue #1575 Phase 3.
rationale: Brand assets should live alongside brand config for easy theming.

title: Phase 4: Logo component refactor
body: Replace TelescopeLogo and other logo references with getBrand().Logo component. See issue #1575 Phase 4.
rationale: Logo is the most prominent brand element and natural next step after Phase 2.

title: Phase 5: i18n brand string extraction
body: Extract brand-specific strings from i18n/{en,he}.json into brand bundle messages. See issue #1575 Phase 5.
rationale: Completes the brand abstraction for all static content.

title: Phase 6: Remaining hardcoded string migrations
body: Migrate remaining brand strings (login pages, copilotkit/route.ts, MCP plugin, etc.) to getBrand(). See issue #1575 Phase 6.
rationale: Completes migration of all brand-specific hardcoded strings.

title: Phase 7: Course data scope decision + smoke test
body: Decide whether course data (titles, descriptions) lives in Payload or brand bundle; add smoke test. See issue #1575 Phase 7.
rationale: Finalizes the multi-brand architecture decision for editable content.
